name: EmailOctopus API
what_it_does: Affordable email marketing platform with REST API — managing subscribers, lists, campaigns, and automations with Amazon SES backend for deliverability, designed as a cost-effective alternative to Mailchimp for bloggers, newsletters, and small businesses.
use_cases: Managing newsletter subscribers and lists via REST API for custom signup flows
Sending email campaigns programmatically to segmented subscriber lists
Building custom subscriber management with tag-based segmentation via API
Importing large subscriber lists for migration from other ESP platforms
Running simple email automations (welcome series, drip) triggered by API events
not_for: Complex behavioral email automation based on user actions (use Customer.io or Braze)
Enterprise email with advanced deliverability tooling (use Postmark or SendGrid)
best_when: A blogger, newsletter creator, or small business needs affordable email marketing with a simple API for subscriber management and campaign sending.
avoid_when: You need behavioral triggers, complex segmentation, SMS, or enterprise deliverability infrastructure.

auth.notes: API key from account settings. Passed as api_key query parameter or in request body. Account-scoped access. No fine-grained scopes. Simple key-per-account model.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: up to 2,500 subscribers and 10,000 emails/month
pricing.paid_tiers: From $9/month for 5,000 subscribers; Pro adds automation
pricing.notes: Very affordable — significant free tier for small newsletters. UK-based company. Amazon SES backend gives good deliverability. Simple pricing per subscriber. Can connect own Amazon SES account (Octopus Connect) for even lower costs at scale.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; free tier most restricted

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covers lists, contacts, campaigns, and automations. Simple API surface. API key in query parameter is non-standard and risky (logged in URLs). Webhook support for subscriber events. Documentation adequate for basic use cases.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Contact create idempotent by email (upsert). List management operations idempotent. Campaign sends create new sends — not idempotent. Tag management idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: API key in query parameter — gets logged in server access logs, use body param instead
Automation API only available on Pro plan — not free tier
Rate limits not publicly documented — contact support for specifics

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant — UK company. EU data residency. API key in query parameter is a security concern (leaked in logs). Domain verification prevents abuse. No formal certifications. Amazon SES backend provides reliable infrastructure.
